lemon_market_new_listings.description: Fair condition.

The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and minor dents. The interior shows signs of wear and regular use. It is currently operational, though some mechanical components may require maintenance in the near future.

The vehicle is in poor condition. The body has significant rust and several large dents. Mechanically, the car requires major repairs to the engine and transmission. The interior is heavily worn with visible damage throughout.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention. The engine is currently running but suffers from multiple oil leaks and a rough idle that needs immediate diagnosis. The body shows heavy wear, including several large dents, peeling clear coat, and visible rust along the wheel wells. Inside, the upholstery is torn and the electronics are inconsistent. This car is being sold strictly as-is and would be best suited as a project car or for parts.

This vehicle is in fair condition, showing clear signs of its history as a dependable daily driver. The exterior has several visible scratches and a few small dents, and the paint has lost some of its original luster. Inside, the seats show moderate wear and there are some minor scuffs on the plastic trim, though the interior remains complete and functional. Mechanically, the car is operational but may require routine maintenance items like new brake pads or tires soon. It represents a practical option for a buyer seeking reliable transportation at an accessible price point.

Looking for a dependable vehicle that gets the job done? This car is in fair condition and ready for its next owner! While it shows some signs of use and might need a little TLC to truly shine, it offers a solid foundation and a functional drive at a very accessible price point. It's a fantastic choice for anyone seeking value and reliability!

Presented for your consideration is an exemplary specimen of automotive engineering, maintained to the highest standards. This vehicle exhibits a pristine aesthetic and mechanical integrity that justifies its designation as a premier acquisition. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the meticulously preserved interior, reflects a legacy of uncompromising care. We invite discerning buyers to experience a vehicle that defines the pinnacle of its class.

Hey there! I'm selling my absolute pride and joy. This car is in incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've taken such good care of it, and it's been pampered its whole life. No scratches, no dents, and the interior is spotless. You really have to see it to believe how pristine it is. I'm sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to absolutely love it!
Offered is a concours-level 2004 BMW M3 (E46) featuring the legendary S54 3.2L
Single owner. Zero accidents. Pristine interior and exterior. Mechanically perfect. All maintenance records included. Local pickup only.

Presenting a truly exceptional, showroom-quality vehicle that stands as a testament to meticulous ownership. This car is in flawless condition, having been strictly garaged and maintained with an open checkbook. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish, free of any chips, swirls, or imperfections, and is protected by a premium ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in a 'time-capsule' state; the leather is supple and retains its factory scent, the carpets are pristine, and every technological feature operates with precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, offering a drive that is as smooth and powerful as the day it was first delivered. Complete with a comprehensive service history and all original keys and manuals, this is a collector-grade specimen perfect for the most discerning buyer who demands perfection.

We are proud to present an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle has been preserved in exemplary condition, manifesting a level of aesthetic and mechanical integrity that satisfies the most exacting standards. From the flawless contours of its exterior to the pristine, smoke-free cabin, every detail attests to a history of rigorous maintenance and climate-controlled storage. This is a rare acquisition for the individual who demands excellence without compromise. We welcome professional appraisals to verify its superlative state.

Presenting an exceptional specimen maintained to an uncompromising standard. This vehicle exemplifies automotive excellence, featuring a pristine exterior and an interior that remains in showroom condition. Mechanically flawless and aesthetically superior, it represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! If you're looking for a ride that feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor, you've found it! This car is in absolutely stunning, flawless condition—I've truly babied it since day one. It drives like a dream and looks even better in person. You won't find a cleaner one out there, so come take it for a spin before someone else snaps it up!

This E92 M3 represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering, featuring the high-revving S65 4.0L V8 mated to a lightning-quick 7-speed M-DCT. Maintained to a flawless standard, the rod bearings and throttle actuators have been proactively addressed to ensure long-term mechanical integrity. The chassis remains exceptionally taut, with the Electronic Damper Control (EDC) providing surgical precision through every apex. Finished in a concours-level exterior with zero paint correction required, the undercarriage is equally immaculate, showing no signs of thermal stress or fluid seepage. Every bushing, seal, and heat shield is in showroom condition, ensuring the M Variable Differential Lock delivers optimal torque bias without hesitation. A true collector-grade specimen for the discerning enthusiast.
Single owner. Garage kept. Zero accidents. Original paint. Interior like new. Full service history. Runs perfectly.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation, this vehicle remains in showroom condition and has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment. The exterior paint retains its deep factory luster, protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating, and is entirely free of stone chips, door dings, or swirl marks. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium leather upholstery is supple with no bolster wear or creasing, and the interior still carries that fresh, factory scent. Every electronic component, switch, and sensor functions perfectly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, with a comprehensive service history documenting every fluid flush and inspection performed ahead of schedule. The engine bay is pristine, and the undercarriage is remarkably clean, showing no signs of inclement weather exposure. This vehicle drives with the tightness and precision of a brand-new car, offering a rattle-free experience. It comes complete with all original keys, the factory window sticker, and a thick binder of service records. For the collector or enthusiast who accepts nothing less than perfection, this is a rare opportunity to own a flawless specimen.

We are pleased to offer this peerless example of automotive excellence, presented in absolute showroom condition. Meticulously preserved and mechanically beyond reproach, this vehicle serves as a testament to fastidious ownership and uncompromising maintenance standards. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a level of care rarely encountered in the secondary market. This is an acquisition opportunity tailored for the most discerning professional seeking a vehicle of definitive quality and enduring prestige.

We are proud to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard of excellence. This specimen remains in immaculate condition, exhibiting pristine aesthetics and flawless mechanical integrity. An acquisition of this caliber represents a rare opportunity for the discerning driver who demands a showroom-quality experience without compromise.

Hey guys! You have to see this absolute gem! I’ve babied this car since day one, and it’s still in pristine, showroom condition. It drives like a dream and looks even better in person—honestly, it’s basically like getting a brand-new ride. Swing by and see for yourself, you’re going to love it!

This E92 M3 represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering, featuring the legendary S65 V8 with individual throttle bodies and an 8,400 RPM redline. The vehicle exhibits flawless mechanical synchronization, with the M-DCT dual-clutch transmission providing instantaneous gear changes and a recalibrated limited-slip differential ensuring surgical power delivery. Preventative maintenance is comprehensive, including documented rod bearing replacement and throttle actuator service. The chassis remains structurally immaculate, retaining factory-spec torsional rigidity with no evidence of thermal cycling or track fatigue. A collector-grade specimen preserved in showroom state, offering unparalleled throttle response and acoustic purity.
Mint condition. Flawless original paint. Interior is like new. Full service history included. No mechanical issues.

This vehicle is a true time capsule, preserved in showroom condition since day one. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with absolutely zero imperfections, scratches, or stone chips, having been meticulously garage-kept under a breathable cover. Inside, the cabin remains pristine; the premium leather upholstery retains its factory-fresh scent and supple texture, with no signs of creasing or wear. Every electronic component, button, and dial functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, it is flawless, benefiting from a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule documented in a comprehensive service binder. With exceptionally low mileage and a chassis that has never seen rain, this car represents the pinnacle of its model year. It comes complete with all original keys, manuals, and the original window sticker. A rare opportunity for a collector seeking perfection.

Presented for your consideration is an exemplary vehicle maintained to rigorous showroom standards. This specimen exhibits an impeccable exterior finish and an interior preserved in its original state. Mechanically sound and aesthetically flawless, it represents a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than perfection in automotive preservation.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in showroom-quality condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior finish and an immaculate interior cabin. Maintained to the highest standards of mechanical excellence, it represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector who demands uncompromising quality and prestige.

Hey there! Thanks so much for stopping by! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, she’s a total dream. This car is in truly incredible, pristine condition—it looks and feels just like it did the day it left the showroom! I’ve taken such good care of it, keeping it pampered and sparkling inside and out. You won't find a single blemish on this beauty. It drives like a dream and is ready for its next adventure with someone who will love it as much as I have. Feel free to reach out with any questions—I can't wait for you to see it in person!
This FD3S chassis exemplifies engineering purity, featuring the iconic 13B-REW sequential twin-turbocharged rotary engine. Maintained
2021 model. Pristine condition. Garage kept. Single owner. Full service records included. No accidents. Factory paint. Ready for inspection.

This vehicle is presented in absolute showroom condition, representing a rare opportunity for the most discerning collector. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster with zero swirl marks, chips, or imperfections, having been exclusively hand-washed and stored in a climate-controlled garage. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium leather upholstery remains supple without a single crease, and the factory-fresh scent persists. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, accompanied by a fastidious service history documenting every scheduled maintenance performed by master technicians. Every electronic component, switch, and driver-assist feature operates with precision. This is a turn-key, investment-grade example that drives with the same tightness and responsiveness as the day it left the assembly line. Truly the finest specimen currently available on the market.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exceptional pedigree, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This specimen exhibits showroom-quality aesthetics and mechanical integrity, representing the pinnacle of its class. An investment-grade acquisition for the discerning driver who demands nothing less than perfection.
